title: tf.keras.layers.Embedding  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Turns positive integers (indexes) into dense vectors of fixed size.
Inherits From:Layer,Operation
e.g.[[4], [20]] -> [[0.25, 0.1], [0.6, -0.2]]

parameters.name: Embedding
parameters.description:
Optional integer. If set, the layer's forward pass
will implement LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation)
with the provided rank. LoRA sets the layer's embeddings
matrix to non-trainable and replaces it with a del

parameters.name: layer.enable_lora(rank)

with the provided rank. LoRA sets the layer's embeddings
matrix to non-trainable and replaces it with a del
